title: SpearDisabler
description: This plugin will allow you to disable spears in minecraft 1.21.11
body:
This plugin allows you to disable spears fully

It disables

- Enchanting
- Damaging players with it
- Item Pickup
- Getting the item from creative


You can also change some of the messages in the config.yml and it will also notify all admins with the permission speardisable.admin
